result.summary: United Rentals exposes one authenticated customer portal surface, Total Control at https://totalcontrol.ur.com; no public developer API/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface was found.

ur_saml_session.label: United Rentals customer SSO session
ur_saml_session.setup: Use the United Rentals sign-in flow from the public site: go to [Sign In / Register](https://www.unitedrentals.com/saml/login) and complete the customer SSO. This is a portal session for Total Control / customer-account pages, not a developer API credential.
